quizzes.question: Which Constitutional Amendment Act introduced the Fundamental Duties into the Indian Constitution?
The concept of Fundamental Duties was inspired by the Constitution of which nation?
Under which Article and Part are the Fundamental Duties enshrined?
Which committee recommended the incorporation of Fundamental Duties?
Are Fundamental Duties justiciable in a court of law?
How many Fundamental Duties were originally added in 1976?
Which amendment added the 11th Fundamental Duty regarding education for children aged 6-14?
In M.C. Mehta v. Union of India (1983), the Supreme Court described Fundamental Duties as a what?
Which of the following statements about the origin of Fundamental Duties is correct?
options: They were part of the original Constitution
They were added 26 years after the Constitution was enacted
quizzes.answer: They were added 26 years after the Constitution was enacted

quizzes.question: Can Parliament provide for the enforcement of Fundamental Duties?
options: Only the Supreme Court can enforce them
